The Real Problem

Why your site is bleeding clients right now

01
🔍

Google Cannot Index You

Without proper SEO architecture Google skips your pages entirely and sends your ideal clients straight to your competitors. You are invisible to buyers already searching for exactly what you offer.

02
📱

Mobile Visitors Leave Instantly

Over 63% of all web traffic comes from mobile devices. If your site loads slowly or breaks on a phone then more than half your potential clients leave before reading a single word.

03
🚫

No Clear Path to Contact You

Even genuinely interested visitors will not reach out if your site makes it confusing. Buried contact pages and unclear calls to action destroy conversions every single day without you knowing.

04
📊

Wrong Keywords Zero Buyers

Ranking for terms nobody searches is worse than not ranking at all. It fools you into thinking SEO is working while buyers who are actually ready to pay can never find your business.

The Cost of Staying Stuck

What inaction costs your business over time

Every month you wait is revenue that goes to a competitor instead of you. These numbers are based on average revenue lost for businesses with poor SEO visibility.

3 Months of Waiting
$5,400
Lost in missed enquiries from people who could not find your business on Google
6 Months of Waiting
$10,800
Compounding loss as competitors grow stronger while your rankings stay flat
12 Months of Waiting
$21,600
A full year of potential clients going elsewhere because your website let them down

About Georgia

I find what your website is hiding from you

Most business owners have no idea their website is actively pushing clients away. The site looks fine to them. But Google sees something completely different and so do visitors who arrive and leave in seconds.

I am Georgia J Chase. I audit business websites personally across every industry and every country. I uncover the real reasons your site is not converting and I fix it. The audit is free. If you want me to fix it I will. If you prefer to handle it yourself the audit is yours to keep. No pressure. Just results.

Real Outcomes

Before the audit. After the audit.

Before
Construction company on page 4 of Google for their main service keyword. No calls from the website in 3 months.
Fix Applied
Rewrote 6 page titles, fixed mobile speed, built 3 local landing pages targeting real buyer searches.
Result
Page 1 in 7 weeks. 14 new enquiry calls in month one. Client booked fixes within 48 hours of receiving the audit.
Before
Salon spending $800 per month on Instagram ads with almost no returns. Website getting 200 visits monthly but zero bookings.
Fix Applied
Fixed broken contact form, added booking CTA to every page, corrected Google Business Profile connection.
Result
Bookings jumped from 0 to 22 per month from organic search alone. Stopped paid ads entirely within 6 weeks.
Before
Online coach with a beautiful website ranking for their own name only. Target clients could not find them at all.
Fix Applied
Restructured site architecture, added 4 buyer intent blog posts, fixed canonical errors causing duplicate content issues.
Result
First organic client signed from Google within 5 weeks. Monthly organic sessions went from 40 to 380 in 90 days.

Self Diagnosis

Does your website have a problem? Find out now

Answer 6 quick questions. Your score tells you whether you need a full audit right now or whether things are looking healthy.

Is your website on page 2 or beyond for your main service keyword?
Has your enquiry or call volume dropped in the last 6 months?
Does your website take more than 3 seconds to load on a phone?
Are you spending money on ads but not seeing results from your website itself?
Do you have fewer than 10 Google reviews on your business profile?
Have you never had a full professional SEO audit done on your website?

How It Works

Three steps. Zero risk. Real results.

1

Submit Your Website

Fill in the short form below with your website URL and the biggest challenge your business faces getting clients online right now. Takes 90 seconds.

2

Personal Audit Delivered

Georgia personally reviews your entire site across SEO structure, keyword visibility, mobile experience, page speed and conversion path. Real eyes. Not a bot. Not a template.

3

You Decide What Happens

You receive everything with a clear priority list. Fix it yourself, pass it to your developer, or ask Georgia to handle it. Fully your call. No pressure ever. The audit is yours regardless.

Questions Answered

Everything you are probably wondering

There is no catch. The audit is Georgia's way of showing you the value she brings before you invest a single penny. If you want help fixing things you can discuss that. If not then the full report is yours to keep forever. No invoice will ever arrive for the audit itself.
Georgia delivers every audit within 48 hours of your submission. Every site is reviewed personally so she takes the time needed to do it properly rather than sending a generic automated scan report.
You receive the full audit with a prioritised fix list. From there the choice is entirely yours. Use it yourself, pass it to a developer, or ask Georgia to handle everything. There is no pressure in any direction.
Absolutely. Everything is written in plain English with no technical jargon whatsoever. You will know exactly what each issue is, why it is costing you clients, and what needs to happen to fix it.
Yes. SEO has no borders and neither does this service. Georgia works with business owners across every country. As long as you have a website and want more customers from it geography is not a barrier.
The 10% discount applies automatically to the first 20 clients who submit their audit request this month. Once you submit the form your spot is reserved. If you later choose to have Georgia implement the fixes the 10% discount is applied to your proposal. No code or voucher needed.
